hooks.trigger: A neon-tagged cairn on a dry wash is found knocked over after a Camarilla patrol pushes past the loop.
hooks.initial_situation: Randall Mckab halts city enforcers at gunpoint, claiming the wash is under Garou watch.
hooks.escalation_path: If the patrol insists, Dorikhan Caine calls in favors to reroute them at cost; any gunfire draws Garou scouts.
hooks.if_ignored: Garou strike a Camarilla convoy in the dark, blaming Gangrel for failing to enforce the line.

hooks.trigger: Jebadiah Walker misses a delivery for the first time in years.
hooks.initial_situation: His truck is found idling at a rest stop, doors open, tire tracks leading into scrub.
hooks.escalation_path: Clues point to an Anarch ambush gone wrong near a Garou trail; rescue requires choosing which faction to notify.
hooks.if_ignored: Garou find the van first and torch it, closing that rest stop to Kindred travel for months.

hooks.trigger: A blood hunt target flees past the city lights toward the Black Canyon frontage roads.
hooks.initial_situation: Tony the Prince's Bodyguard blocks pursuit, citing the old Prince’s rule against hunts beyond the loop.
hooks.escalation_path: Camarilla officers threaten him; he offers a timed escort under strict silence in exchange for owed boons.
hooks.if_ignored: The target escapes into Garou country, and Camarilla blame the Gangrel, demanding routes they will not grant.

hooks.trigger: Joanna hears a low hum in the canal concrete and refuses to let anyone pass her bridge.
hooks.initial_situation: Nosferatu messengers demand access; a Malkavian claims the hum is a warning from the sand itself.
hooks.escalation_path: Lewis Merrow proposes a boat bypass, but it requires paying Joanna and silencing witnesses.
hooks.if_ignored: A section of canal collapses that night, drowning a messenger and exposing Nosferatu tunnels.

hooks.trigger: Marta "Switchback" Ortiz announces she is rationing her route intel until she gets fuel and water.
hooks.initial_situation: Anarchs promise barter; Camarilla offer scrip; she asks PCs to arbitrate without starting a turf grab.
hooks.escalation_path: If payment falters, she sells different maps to each side, setting up collisions on frontage roads.
hooks.if_ignored: Both factions drive blind into a Garou sweep, blaming the Gangrel for staged misdirection.

hooks.trigger: A stack of stones marking a no-go arroyo disappears overnight.
hooks.initial_situation: Brujah smugglers admit moving it to open a faster run; Randall Mckab demands restitution.
hooks.escalation_path: Brujah muscle push back; Randall calls Dorikhan to summon desert allies to box them in.
hooks.if_ignored: Garou patrol the cleared arroyo next moon and tear apart the next crew that crosses.

hooks.trigger: A Camarilla dignitary begs Tony for extraction from a motel beyond posted limits.
hooks.initial_situation: Tony assembles a three-car convoy and requires PCs to ride point under blackout rules.
hooks.escalation_path: Noise or lights draw state troopers; failure to obey Tony’s signals risks a shootout at the boundary.
hooks.if_ignored: The dignitary is captured by mortals; mortal heat forces a month-long shutdown of that corridor.

hooks.trigger: Dorikhan reports Garou howls closer to the canals than ever before.
hooks.initial_situation: He insists all travel halt for one night; Anarchs call it superstition, Camarilla call it disobedience.
hooks.escalation_path: If overruled, Dorikhan withdraws escorts; the next convoy faces unseen hunters testing their resolve.
hooks.if_ignored: Garou strike along multiple roads, forcing a citywide curfew that cripples movement and trade.
